phases.title: .agents/ Deletion & Verification (ADR-007)

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 11
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

doneWhen: `.agents/` directory does not exist in the repository
`git ls-files .agents/` returns empty
`grep -rn '\.agents/' src/ --include='*.ts'` returns zero results (excluding `config.agents` property access)
`pnpm build` passes
`pnpm test` passes
`gwrk define spec --help` resolves workflow from builtins
